# Security Policy

## Supported Seed Scope

This repository provides standards and templates. Security issues in these assets should be reported responsibly.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please include:

- A clear description of the issue
- Potential impact
- Steps to reproduce
- Suggested mitigation if available

Avoid public disclosure before triage and mitigation.

## Security Expectations for Generated Projects

- Validate all external input
- Enforce authentication and authorization
- Keep secrets outside source control
- Use rate limiting and timeout protections
- Log securely without sensitive data exposure
